intentSynonyms: get a checkout summary in pandaexpress
look up a checkout summary in pandaexpress
fetch a single checkout summary in pandaexpress
view one specific checkout summary in pandaexpress
review order totals before checkout in pandaexpress
description: Validate and get the checkout summary for a basket. Returns the total, tax, and estimated ready time. Call this before submitting an order to review the final totals.
